title: Be My Star
synopsis:
Commander—

Do you think we've truly become the "stars of the Ark"?
I hope you'll see the answer with your own eyes—

This music video is something we're really proud of!
We put a lot of care into the editing, so we definitely want you to watch it!

Listen to it a lot and keep it on repeat!
And don’t forget to give us lots of likes, shares, and comments too.

(Source: YouTube, translated)
